data.content: Implemented the remaining 1f10 retry-loop delta on current main. Take-loop iterations now write detailed per-agent outcome records plus aggregated success summaries to .foolery-logs/agent-success-rates.json, classify zero-exit outcomes precisely, and only mark rollbacks when an action-state rollback actually occurred. Added coverage for outcome storage/reporting and terminal-manager retry classifications. Verified with bun run lint . (warnings only, no errors), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
